nodes.name: Lionel Dietrichsen

nodes.name: The Australian Bird Guide
nodes.summary: The Australian Bird Guide (The Guide) was published by CSIRO Publishing in 2017.

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Purple-crowned lorikeet
nodes.summary: Purple-crowned lorikeet（Purple-crowned lorikeet，学名 Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州

nodes.name: 澳大利亚
nodes.summary: 澳大利亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Glossopsitta porphyrocephala |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22684658A254009173 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22684658A254009173.en |access-date=26 June 2025}} | taxon = Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus | authority = (Dietrichsen, 1837) | range_map = Purple-crowned Lorikeet.png | range_map_caption = Distribution of the purple-crowned lorikeet | synonyms = * Glossopsitta porphyrocephala * Parvipsitta porphyrocephala }} The purple-crowned lorikeet (Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus), (also known as the porphyry-crowned lorikeet, zit parrot, blue-crowned lorikeet, purple-capped lorikeet, lory, cowara, lorikeet, and purple-capped parakeet) is a lorikeet found in scrub and mallee of southern Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The purple-crowned lorikeet is found in southwest Western Australia, and in southern South Australia, east from the southern Eyre Peninsula, through the Gawler Ranges and southern Flinders Ranges and across Victoria to East Gippsland

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also found on Kangaroo Island, but is not found in Tasmania. It is the only native lorikeet found in Western Australia. Locally nomadic, it is often found in dry sclerophyll forest and town parks and gardens, especially where Eucalyptus trees are flowering
